mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.TEAM_IDX TEAM_IDX, T.TEAM_NAME TEAM_NAME, T.TEAM_MANAGER TEAM_MANAGER, T.TEAM_CONTENT TEAM_CONTENT, T.TEAM_LOCATION TEAM_LOCATION, T.TEAM_REGDATE TEAM_REGDATE, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, (SELECT L.LEAGUE_NAME FROM TEAM_LEAGUE TL JOIN LEAGUE L ON TL.LEAGUE_IDX = L.LEAGUE_IDX WHERE TL.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND TL.JOIN_STATUS = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1) LEAGUE_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEAM_LEAGUE WHERE TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND JOIN_STATUS = 1) JOIN_LEAGUE_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1 ) MEMBER_COUNT FROM TEAM T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX
AND T.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND (T.TEAM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR T.TEAM_LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY T.TEAM_IDX DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{numOfRows} ) WHERE RN > #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEAM T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX
AND T.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND (T.TEAM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR T.TEAM_LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT T.TEAM_IDX TEAM_IDX, T.TEAM_NAME TEAM_NAME, T.TEAM_MANAGER TEAM_MANAGER, T.TEAM_CONTENT TEAM_CONTENT, T.TEAM_LOCATION TEAM_LOCATION, T.TEAM_REGDATE TEAM_REGDATE, M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = T.TEAM_IDX AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1) MEMBER_COUNT, (SELECT SFILE_NAME FROM FILES WHERE TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx}) SFILE_NAME FROM TEAM T LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON T.TEAM_MANAGER = M.MEMBER_IDX WHERE T.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TEAM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TEAM (TEAM_IDX, TEAM_NAME, TEAM_MANAGER, TEAM_CONTENT, TEAM_LOCATION, TEAM_REGDATE, IS_ACTIVE) VALUES (#{team_idx}, #{team_name}, #{team_manager}, #{team_content}, #{team_location}, SYSDATE, 'Y')
INSERT INTO FILES (FILE_NUM, TEAM_IDX, FILE_NAME, FILE_EXT, SFILE_NAME) VALUES (SEQ_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{team_idx}, #{file_name}, #{file_ext}, #{sfile_name})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEAM WHERE TEAM_NAME = #{team_name}
SELECT L.LEAGUE_NAME FROM TEAM_LEAGUE TL JOIN LEAGUE L ON TL.LEAGUE_IDX = L.LEAGUE_IDX WHERE TL.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx} AND TL.JOIN_STATUS = 1

SELECT M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, MT.POSITION POSITION, MT.BACK_NUM BACK_NUM, MT.ELITE ELITE FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN MEMBER M ON MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx} AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 1
AND (M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR MT.POSITION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY MT.BACK_NUM ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_TEAM (MEMBER_IDX, TEAM_IDX, JOIN_STATUS) VALUES (#{member_idx}, #{team_idx}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT M.MEMBER_NAME MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_IDX MEMBER_IDX, MT.POSITION POSITION, MT.BACK_NUM BACK_NUM, MT.ELITE ELITE FROM MEMBER_TEAM MT JOIN MEMBER M ON MT.MEMBER_IDX = M.MEMBER_IDX WHERE MT.TEAM_IDX = #{team_idx} AND MT.JOIN_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY MT.MEMBER_IDX ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_TEAM (MEMBER_IDX, TEAM_IDX, POSITION, ELITE, JOIN_STATUS) VALUES (#{member_idx}, #{team_idx}, #{position}, #{elite}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT sfile_name FROM FILES WHERE team_idx = #{team_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE TEAM SET is_active = 'N', team_content = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' 일자로 해체된 팀입니다.' WHERE team_idx = #{team_idx}
